query: Add idempotency protection to the payment webhook and include regression tests.
This background job occasionally creates duplicate invoices. Find the cause, fix it, and verify the fix.
Refactor the shared cache client without changing its public behavior, then run the affected tests.
Upgrade the database driver and make any compatibility changes required by the repository.
Implement the new account deletion endpoint, including authorization and audit logging.
Our integration test is flaky only under parallel execution. Diagnose and resolve it.
Migrate the stored status field to the new enum while keeping rolling deployments safe.
Wire the existing retry policy into the outbound email integration and verify failure behavior.
The API starts timing out after a few thousand records. Measure the path and implement a focused fix.
Fix the tenant isolation vulnerability in this repository and add evidence that another tenant cannot access the data.
Review this pull request for security and correctness issues, but do not change any files.
Design an event-driven architecture for the new billing workflow and compare it with keeping the current monolith.
Explain how the authentication middleware works.
Write an ADR comparing PostgreSQL and DynamoDB for this service.
Summarize the uncommitted changes in this repository.
What are the common causes of race conditions?
Translate the README from English to Turkish.
Evaluate whether our proposed schema migration is safe; provide recommendations only.
Create a product requirements document for account deletion.
Look at this patch and list only blocking review findings.
Execute the plan in our .apex-design workspace, verify each task, and keep the progress board updated.
Write the .apex-design plan for this feature before we build anything.
